parameters.query:
-- Conditional dequeue: skip jobs still waiting on async music / voice / avatar generation.
-- Pick iff:
--   (music_enabled=false OR music_url ready)
--   AND (voice_enabled=false OR voice_audio_url ready)
--   AND (avatar_enabled=false OR avatar_url ready)          -- avatar pipeline: Kling + matting done
--   OR queued > 45 minutes (timeout override — larger than before because avatar legitimately takes ~30 min)
-- progress = GREATEST(progress, 75): never downgrade if Avatar Video already left us at 70+.
UPDATE jobs
SET status = 'processing', started_at = NOW(), progress = GREATEST(progress, 75)
WHERE id = (
  SELECT id FROM jobs
  WHERE status = 'queued'
    AND (
      (
        (music_enabled = false OR music_url IS NOT NULL)
        AND
        (voice_enabled = false OR voice_audio_url IS NOT NULL)
        AND
        (avatar_enabled = false OR avatar_url IS NOT NULL)
      )
      OR created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '45 minutes'
    )
  ORDER BY created_at
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
  LIMIT 1
)
RETURNING id::text AS job_id, user_id::text AS user_id, title, items::text AS items_json, music_enabled, music_url, voice_enabled, voice_audio_url, avatar_enabled, avatar_url, aspect_ratio
UPDATE jobs SET status = 'error', error_message = '{{ $json.error.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', completed_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.job_id }}'
UPDATE jobs SET progress = GREATEST(progress, 80) WHERE id = '{{ $('Build Plan').first().json.job_id }}'
UPDATE jobs SET progress = GREATEST(progress, 85) WHERE id = '{{ $('Build Plan').first().json.job_id }}'
UPDATE jobs SET progress = GREATEST(progress, 90) WHERE id = '{{ $('Build Plan').first().json.job_id }}'
UPDATE jobs SET progress = GREATEST(progress, 95) WHERE id = '{{ $('Build Plan').first().json.job_id }}'

-- Queued jobs waiting on async workers Music / Voice / Avatar IMG / Avatar Video.
UPDATE jobs
SET progress = GREATEST(progress, LEAST(progress + 1, 70))
WHERE status = 'queued' AND progress < 70

INSERT INTO videos (user_id, job_id, title, file_url, duration_seconds)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Build Plan').first().json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $('Build Plan').first().json.job_id }}',
  '{{ $('Build Plan').first().json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Build Plan').first().json.public_url }}',
  {{ $('Check Probe').first().json.duration_seconds }}
)
RETURNING id::text
UPDATE jobs SET status = 'done', progress = GREATEST(progress, 100), completed_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $('Build Plan').first().json.job_id }}'

INSERT INTO user_notifications (user_id, level, title, body, related_job) VALUES ('{{ $('Build Plan').first().json.user_id }}', 'success', 'Your video is ready', 'Your montage finished rendering and is available in Ready Videos.', '{{ $('Build Plan').first().json.job_id }}')

DELETE FROM videos WHERE job_id = 'c244c0ca-2360-4096-a443-181bd80725ee';

UPDATE jobs
SET status = 'queued',
    progress = 70,
    completed_at = NULL,
    error_message = NULL
WHERE id = 'c244c0ca-2360-4096-a443-181bd80725ee';
